mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_code_detail WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND (code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR code_name_ko LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR code_name_en LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR code_name_zh LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY sort_order ASC, code ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_code_detail WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_code_detail (group_id, code, code_value, code_name_ko, code_name_en, code_name_zh, description_ko, description_en, description_zh, is_active, sort_order, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{code}, #{codeValue}, #{codeNameKo}, #{codeNameEn}, #{codeNameZh}, #{descriptionKo}, #{descriptionEn}, #{descriptionZh}, #{isActive}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_code_detail SET code_value = #{codeValue}, code_name_ko = #{codeNameKo}, code_name_en = #{codeNameEn}, code_name_zh = #{codeNameZh}, description_ko = #{descriptionKo}, description_en = #{descriptionEn}, description_zh = #{descriptionZh}, is_active = #{isActive}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT d.* FROM tb_code_detail d INNER JOIN tb_code_group g ON d.group_id = g.id WHERE g.group_code = #{groupCode} AND d.is_active = 1 ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC, d.code ASC
